ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subway_stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subway station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subway station */,
  "has_perk" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station has a perk associated with it */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location table for the station's address and coordinates */,
  "line_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the subway line the station belongs to */,
  "platform_count" INTEGER /* Number of platforms at the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the station can handle at a time */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the station is accessible for people with disabilities */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Time the station opens */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time the station closes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the station information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subway_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_categories" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Reference to the subway station */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "cross_street" TEXT /* Cross street of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "formatted_address" TEXT /* Formatted address for display purposes */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "nearest_landmark" TEXT /* Name of the nearest landmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., passenger, staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned in the rewards program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perks" (
  "perk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perk */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the perk */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Reference to the subway station where the perk is available */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the perk becomes available */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the perk expires */,
  "redeemed_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the perk has been redeemed */,
  "max_redemptions" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the perk can be redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perks_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES subway_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Reference to the subway station */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the information */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or app used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES subway_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service update */,
  "station_id" TEXT /* Reference to the subway station affected by the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service update */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service update */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the update (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the update record */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the update record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_updates_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES subway_stations ("station_id")
)
